inputs.name: in
inputs.label: CSV Text
inputs.description: Raw CSV text to parse into structured data.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Parsed Data
outputs.description: Array of row objects (or arrays) parsed from the CSV.

outputs.name: rows
outputs.label: Row Count
outputs.description: Number of data rows (excluding the header if present).

outputs.name: headers
outputs.label: Headers
outputs.description: Array of column header names from the first row.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the CSV could not be parsed.
